steps.title: Intensify the claim
steps.content: The sentence first says the differences between the two editions are extreme. The next idea strengthens that claim by saying some critics regard the editions as two different novels altogether.

steps.title: Reject wrong relationships
steps.content: A signals contrast, but the critics' view reinforces the claim. C signals concession, which does not fit because the second idea is not surprising despite the first. D signals restatement, but the critics' view adds a stronger supporting point. The answer is B.
